ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "ship_date" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "ship_mode" TEXT /* Mode of shipping (e.g., Second Class, Standard Class) */,
  "sales" REAL /* Total sales amount for the order */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Total quantity of products ordered */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the order */,
  "profit" REAL /* Profit made from the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., Pending, Processing, Shipped, Delivered, Cancelled) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal, Bank Transfer) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "customer_feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the customer regarding the order */,
  "sales_rep_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales representative responsible for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_sales_rep_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_rep_id") REFERENCES sales_representatives ("sales_rep_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "segment" TEXT /* Segment of the customer (e.g., Consumer, Corporate) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the customer is located */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the customer is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the customer is located */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the customer's location */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the customer is located */,
  "customer_type" TEXT /* Type of customer (e.g., Individual, Corporate) */,
  "signup_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer signed up */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the customer's last purchase */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  "preferred_payment_method" TEXT /* Preferred payment method of the customer */,
  "preferred_shipping_mode" TEXT /* Preferred shipping mode of the customer */,
  "customer_lifecycle_stage" TEXT /* Customer lifecycle stage (e.g., New, Active, Dormant, Churned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., Furniture, Office Supplies) */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Sub-category of the product (e.g., Bookcases, Chairs) */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the product */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "product_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "product_weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "product_dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product (e.g., 10x10x10 cm) */,
  "product_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the product */,
  "product_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* ID of the order that the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product that the item represents */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "sales" REAL /* Sales amount for the item */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the item */,
  "profit" REAL /* Profit made from the item */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the item */,
  "return_status" TEXT /* Return status of the item (e.g., Not Returned, Returned, Refunded) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipments" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* ID of the order that the shipment belongs to */,
  "ship_date" TEXT /* Date the shipment was made */,
  "ship_mode" TEXT /* Mode of shipping (e.g., Second Class, Standard Class) */,
  "shipment_status" TEXT /* Status of the shipment (e.g., Shipped, Delivered) */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual delivery date */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Carrier used for the shipment (e.g., UPS, FedEx) */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping */,
  "delivery_signature" TEXT /* Signature of the person who received the delivery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "region_manager" TEXT /* Name of the region manager */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sales representative, analyst, administrator) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions of the user in a JSON format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_representatives" (
  "sales_rep_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales representative */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is a sales representative */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region that the sales representative is responsible for */,
  "performance_score" REAL /* Performance score of the sales representative */,
  "commission_rate" REAL /* Commission rate for the sales representative */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_rep_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_representatives_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_representatives_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* ID of the order that the analytics data belongs to */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product that the analytics data represents */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region that the analytics data is for */,
  "sales" REAL /* Sales amount for the product in the region */,
  "profit" REAL /* Profit made from the product in the region */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "ship_date" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "sales_rep_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales representative responsible for the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order */,
  "product_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the product */,
  "product_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_sales_rep_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_rep_id") REFERENCES sales_representatives ("sales_rep_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)
